repsConfig.description: How the rep targets are laid out: one fixed target, a min–max range, or a per-set pyramid.

supersetWithNext.description: When true, this exercise is performed back-to-back with the following one (a superset), with no rest in between.

link.description: A url to some explanation of how to do this. We should not fill this unless the user has explicitly given us a link to fill

trackPower.description: When true, the app prompts for and records the peak power (watts) of each completed set, for equipment with a power readout (e.g. Keiser functional trainers).
